title: Warm up
content: The slide features three images depicting driving experiences in three Chinese cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: This slide highlights the evolving nature of China through a visual journey. It features imagery of taxis and famous cityscapes.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The slide outlines the structure for investigating and researching local city features. It focuses on identifying local features, developing strategies, and evaluating outcomes.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: Cities are matched with specific development strategies. Beijing focuses on technology and tradition integration, Chongqing on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou on tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: Taxi drivers offer perspectives on city development strategies. The slide underscores China's evolving nation status and highlights strategies based on local features.
